internalName: Baan Benjamart at Dhevatara Residence Estate
place: Bophut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Beachfront Cliffside Pavilion Villa
note: Fully staffed · private chef · + tax & service
blurb: An enchanting 1,247 m² beachfront villa in a managed residence estate at Bophut, with a sparkling 12-metre infinity pool and overwater steps to a Thai-style sala framing Samui’s golden sunrise. A ground-floor pavilion and two elevated cliffside pavilions, fully staffed with a private chef. Six minutes to Fisherman’s Village, three to Bophut Beach.
detail:
An enchanting 1,247 m² beachfront villa with a sparkling 12-metre infinity pool, set within a managed residence estate at Bophut. The property is fully staffed with a private chef, and yoga mats and in-villa spa treatments are available on request — relaxation is as much a part of the experience as the view. The multi-storey home is just a six-minute drive to Fisherman’s Village and a three-minute walk to Bophut Beach.

The four-bedroom villa features air-conditioned pavilions with rich wooden accents, airy interiors and floor-to-ceiling glass doors that invite natural light. Overwater steps lead to a charming sala, a Thai-style gazebo perfect for admiring Samui’s golden sunrise.

The main ground-floor pavilion houses the indoor lounge, dining room, kitchen and a bedroom with twin beds. Two elevated cliffside pavilions hold three further bedrooms, each with sea views and access to a shared balcony-terrace; the largest features a romantic four-poster bed and a dressing area leading to a soaking tub for two, a rain shower and a private garden. Kayaks and a BBQ grill are available on request. The shoreline in front of the estate is rocky; a short 200-metre stroll along the coast brings you to a swimmable stretch of beach.

features.l: 12 m infinity pool · overwater steps to sala
Master four-poster · soaking tub for two
Yoga mats & in-villa spa on request
Kayaks & BBQ on request · 6 min to Fisherman’s Village
